markdown-editor.customCss: .vditor { --border-color: #e5e9f0; --second-color: #d8dee9; --panel-background-color: #eceff4; --panel-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .vditor--dark { background-color: #ffffff !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-content { background-color: #ffffff !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-reset { color: #434c5e !important; background-color: #ffffff !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-toolbar { background-color: #eceff4 !important; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e9f0 !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-toolbar .vditor-icon { color: #4c566a !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-toolbar .vditor-icon:hover, .vditor--dark .vditor-toolbar .vditor-icon--current { color: #bf616a !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-reset h1 { color: #bf616a !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-reset h2 { color: #ebcb8b !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-reset h3 { color: #a3be8c !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-reset h4 { color: #b48ead !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-reset h5 { color: #8fbcbb !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-reset h6 { color: #81a1c1 !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-reset strong { color: #a3be8c !important; font-weight: 600 !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-reset em { color: #a3be8c !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-reset a { color: #d08770 !important; text-decoration: none !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-reset a:hover { color: #81a1c1 !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-reset code:not(pre code) { color: #88c0d0 !important; background-color: #eceff4 !important; border-radius: 4px; } .vditor--dark .vditor-reset pre, .vditor--dark .vditor-reset pre code { background-color: #eceff4 !important; color: #434c5e !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-reset blockquote { border-left: 3px solid #81a1c1 !important; color: #4c566a !important; background-color: rgba(236,239,244,0.5) !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-reset mark { background-color: #ebcb8b !important; color: #2e3440 !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-reset table { border: 1px solid #e5e9f0 !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-reset th { font-weight: 600 !important; background-color: rgba(236,239,244,0.4) !important; border: 1px solid #e5e9f0 !important; color: #434c5e !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-reset td { border: 1px solid #e5e9f0 !important; color: #434c5e !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-reset hr { border-color: #e5e9f0 !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-ir__marker { color: #b48ead !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-ir__marker--heading { color: #4c566a !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-ir__link { color: #b48ead !important; } .vditor--dark ::selection { background-color: rgba(191,97,106,0.3) !important; } .vditor--dark .vditor-reset input[type=checkbox] { border: 1px solid #81a1c1; border-radius: 0; } .vditor--dark .vditor-reset input[type=checkbox]:checked { background-color: #81a1c1; }
